name: Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Add milk and sugar to a saucepan.
2. Stir and cook on medium until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Continue cooking until it reaches the soft-ball stage.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla, peanut butter.
5. Pour into a greased pan.
6. Allow to cool, then cut into squares.
